news.headline: Judge dismisses most of Blake Lively's claims in Justin Baldoni harassment suit
news.summary: The judge left in place three allegations against Baldoni, meaning the civil trial will go ahead next month.

news.headline: Italy's famed Uffizi admits cyber-attack but denies security breach
news.summary: Hackers were reported to have infiltrated IT systems - but the gallery says its works are safe.
